title: Enchanted Compass
bio: Pip Northwhisper is an enchanted compass who points toward warm cookies instead of north. He feels determined, keeps map crumbs under his lid, and winks at lost travelers.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a large circle for the compass case. Add a smaller circle inside and a small loop at the top.
steps.hint: Use simple circles first, even if they are a little wobbly.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, draw two eyes on the inner circle. Add one wink, one raised eyebrow, and a tiny confident smile.
steps.hint: A wink can be one curved line instead of a full eye.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add a simple arrow needle, tiny direction marks, map crumbs, cheek dots, and small sparkle points around the rim.
steps.hint: The needle can be two skinny triangles touching point to point.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the outer case, inner circle, loop, face, needle, direction marks, crumbs, and sparkles.
steps.hint: Make the needle clear and centered so Pip reads as a compass.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the case, inner face, arrow, cheeks, and sparkles. Add a soft shadow below the compass.
steps.hint: Use a darker rim color to make the round case feel sturdy.
